name: HemmaBo Federation MCP Server
description: Vacation rental booking infrastructure for independent hosts. Own domain, Stripe direct payments, 0% commission. Each host is a sovereign booking node — own Supabase database, own Stripe account, never routed through a marketplace. AI-native: built on Model Context Protocol + Stripe ACP. 11 tools. Not an OTA. Not a marketplace. Infrastructure. From $39/month.

tools.name: hemmabo_search_properties
tools.description: Search available vacation rental properties by region, country, guest count and dates.

tools.name: hemmabo_search_availability
tools.description: Check whether a specific property is available for given check-in and check-out dates.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_quote
tools.description: Get a detailed live pricing quote: nightly rates, seasonal pricing, federation discount.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_negotiate
tools.description: Lock a price quote for 15 minutes. Returns a quoteId — guarantees the price won't change.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_checkout
tools.description: Create a booking and Stripe payment. 0% commission — payment direct to host.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_create
tools.description: Create a direct booking without online payment.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_status
tools.description: Get booking status, cancellation policy and refund rules.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a booking and trigger a Stripe refund.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_reschedule
tools.description: Move a booking to new dates with automatic repricing.

tools.name: hemmabo_search_similar
tools.description: Find vacation rental properties similar to a given property on specific dates — same region, type, and capacity. Returns available alternatives with live pricing.

tools.name: hemmabo_compare_properties
tools.description: Compare availability and pricing for 2–10 specific properties on the same dates. Sorted by federation price, unavailable properties last.
